message:
🐛 Fix AI offline card persistence + add missing dashboard configs (#504)

* 🐛 Remove invalid /gpu route from sidebar customizer

The /gpu route doesn't exist - only /gpu-reservations does.
Removed the duplicate entry to prevent redirect issues.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Centralize dashboard default cards + add caching to offline detector

- Add getDefaultCards() and getDefaultCardsForDashboard() utilities
- Update 20 dashboard components to use centralized config
- Add module-level cache to ConsoleOfflineDetectionCard for node data
- Ensures AI Offline Detector appears first on main/clusters dashboards
- Single source of truth for dashboard default cards in /config/dashboards/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix default cards being replaced by demo cards on navigation

The isLocalOnlyCard check was missing the 'default-' prefix,
causing cards from DEFAULT_DASHBOARD_CARDS to be replaced with
demo cards when the backend returns empty data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix AI offline detector caching - report hasAnyData from cache

The card now properly reports hasAnyData when there's cached node data,
preventing skeleton from showing on navigation when cache is available.
Also combines isLoading state from both GPU nodes and local nodes fetch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add centralized configs for remaining dashboards

Add centralized configuration files for:
- Logs dashboard
- Data Compliance dashboard
- Arcade dashboard
- Deploy dashboard

All dashboard configurations are now managed centrally in
/config/dashboards/ for consistent default cards and features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
